unit.coverage_estimate: ~87% overall; ~97% on domain.policy + domain.audit + application.service (critical paths)

contract.coverage: Kafka audit event byte-grep (3 result types + reflection + Avro namespace) + ArchUnit customerId source rules (2 @ArchTest + deliberate violation fixture) + balance-is-string FE + BE @WebMvcTest assertions

performance.note: No k6/Gatling scripts exist. Gap GAP-P2-001. NON-BLOCKING for demo sprint. Must be addressed before production.

mutation.confidence: high — test quality audit shows mutation-resistant assertions on all comparator branches and audit emission paths

payload.unit_coverage_estimate: ~87% overall; critical financial paths (domain.policy, domain.audit, application.service) >= 95%
payload.critical_path_coverage: all 6 critical path tests present and verified: (CP-1) balance serialized as STRING; (CP-2) audit payload field exclusion Security C-2; (CP-3) IDOR guard 403+FORBIDDEN+zero AccountPort; (CP-4) Redis fail-open + audit always emitted BR-014; (CP-5) ArchUnit customerId source structural enforcement; (CP-6) FE no re-sort accounts in received order
payload.contract_coverage_note: Kafka audit event verified via byte-grep + reflection. FE<->BE OpenAPI contract verified via G7 integration (0 drift) + @WebMvcTest balance-is-string + Jest balance type. Pact consumer-driven contracts absent (GAP-P2-002 NON-BLOCKING).
payload.e2e_tests: 14 Playwright tests present at frontend/e2e/balance-comparison.e2e.spec.ts covering AC-001, AC-002, AC-003, AC-005. Run against localhost with page.route() mocks — not staging deployed stack.
payload.performance_tests: ABSENT — GAP-P2-001 NON-BLOCKING. k6 scripts must be written at infra/k6/balance-dashboard/ before production. SLA targets: p95 warm < 500ms, p95 cold < 800ms, error rate < 0.1%, 50 VUs, 5 minutes, staging environment.
payload.sla_note: Performance SLA from US-BC-003 (p95 warm < 500ms, p95 cold < 800ms) is NOT validated by automated tests. Non-blocking for demo context. Carry to backlog as BC-DEBT-PERF-001.

security_constraints_verified.security_c2_test: KafkaAuditEventPublisherContractTest — byte-grep + reflection for all 3 result types
security_constraints_verified.security_c4_test: LogMaskingTest (11 tests — FULL_UUID_PATTERN never in masked output)

banking_specific_coverage.fail_open_test: BalanceDashboardServiceTest (5) — unit; GAP-P2-004 for Testcontainers depth

gaps.summary: Performance tests absent — no k6/Gatling scripts at infra/k6/balance-dashboard/. SLA targets from US-BC-003 unvalidated.
gaps.action: Write k6 script before production. Backlog: BC-DEBT-PERF-001.

gaps.summary: Pact consumer-driven contract tests absent. FE<->BDS contract covered by G7 drift check + typed Jest fixtures. Pact required before independent service deployment.
gaps.action: Implement Pact before BDS/FE are deployed independently. Backlog: BC-DEBT-CONTRACT-001.

gaps.summary: Resilience4j TimeLimiter 300ms value not test-asserted. Exists in ResilienceConfig but no automated assertion on the property value.
Redis fail-open verified at unit level (Mockito mock) only. No Testcontainers test where Redis container is stopped mid-test to verify real Lettuce exception path.
gaps.action: Add Testcontainers integration test that stops Redis container and verifies 200 response via live path before production.

gaps.summary: AccountViewTest, BalanceSnapshotTest, RankedDashboardTest named unit tests absent. Domain record classes covered indirectly through service/controller/ranker tests.
gaps.action: Add dedicated unit tests for traceability. Balance-is-BigDecimal (not double) assertion missing at model level; present at serialization level.

payload.anti_patterns_note: No H2, no embedded Kafka, no Thread.sleep, no tests mocking SUT, no localStorage auth fallback. All Testcontainers integration tests use static containers for class-level reuse.

metadata.notes: QA Phase 2 complete. Total test inventory: 170 tests (138 unit, 9 integration, 9 contract/arch, 14 E2E). All banking-specific compliance constraints (Security C-2, C-3, C-4) are test-enforced. 5 gaps documented; all classified NON-BLOCKING for demo sprint. Performance SLA cannot be validated without a running staging environment. G9 verdict: APPROVED.
metadata.next_agent: banking-devops P2 (full deploy) — parallel with banking-docs (after banking-docs also completes, per SDLC flow)
metadata.parallel_track: banking-docs must also complete before banking-devops P2 can proceed
